Source: https://github.com/Weizhena/Deep-Research-skills
Upstream branch: master
Upstream commit: 014b5d0e416a77cffa2ce0139284b74d1d3dc84d

This directory vendors the OpenCode-oriented English subset used by this project:

- OpenCode research skills
- OpenCode web-search agent
- OpenCode web-search strategy modules

The goal is to keep the pack versioned in this repository and let `Install.ps1`
copy it into the real OpenCode runtime paths on the local machine.
